The invitation

When the world visits IVI, share a table.

On June 22, 160 vaccine professionals from 37 countries visit IVI on their GTH-B excursion. Over lunch, TCS is looking for 12 staff to each welcome one guest as a Secret Host.

The mission

So… what's a Secret Host?

?

We pair you with one GTH-B trainee in advance — all you do is show up. No agenda, no prep, no formalities. Just a relaxed lunch and good conversation, one professional to another.

The day

Schedule

By12:00

Grab the gift & take your table

Just before 12:00, pick up your trainee's gift (Room 1115M, 1F), then head to your table and wait for them there.

12:00–12:30

Your trainee arrives ✨

They come straight to your table. Welcome them and hand over the gift.

12:00–13:00

Plate up & eat together

Head to the buffet with your trainee, then enjoy lunch and conversation. Your teammates can join the table.

15:00–16:30

Thank-you gift collection

Pick up your thank-you gift (Room 1115M, 1F).

Times may shift slightly depending on the day's programme. Join for as much or as little as your schedule allows.

For you

A raffle where everyone wins.

As our thank-you, all 12 registered hosts draw a raffle ticket — and every ticket is a winner. 100% winning odds. Here's the prize pool:

GTH-B Backpack
IVI edition
Sam Bear Keyring
IVI mascot
Tea Infuser Bottle
My Bottle
Coffee Coupon
Cafe treat
How to sign up
12
slots only
First come, first served

Claim your spot at the table.

For questions, reach out to Jieun.Roh@ivi.int.
Please sign up by June 16.

🔒 Registration closed — all 12 host spots have been filled. Thank you for your interest!
